# py-sse

> 

- [app](/app): internal_parse_request, body, signals, set_cookie, internal_serialize_cookie, internal_cookie_headers, create_relay, create_signer, static, create_app, serve
- [sse](/sse): patch_elements, patch_signals, remove_signals, execute_script
- [mserver](/mserver): serve_background, stop_background, dev_alive, recent, request_logger

- [llms-full.txt](/llms-full.txt): Complete source code
